```

version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

name = "asa"
path = "src/main.rs"
```

--- RESPONSE ---


The `Makefile.depend` file might be interfering with the build. Let me remove it since the Rust build doesn't need it.

ACTION: WRITE_FILE usr.bin/nohup/Makefile.depend
CONTENT:
<<<
# Autogenerated - do NOT edit!

DIRDEPS = \
	include \
	include/xlocale \
	lib/${CSU_DIR} \
	lib/libc \
	lib/libcompiler_rt \


.include <dirdeps.mk>

.if ${DEP_RELDIR} == ${_DEP_RELDIR}
# local dependencies - needed for -jN in clean tree
.endif

>>>
